zh.Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Scotland: 蘇格蘭斯林史爾班諾可本
zh.Langley Abbey, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可明日香
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Ufford於1279年6月11日出生在英國素福爾可斯托福時，他的父親Robert de Ufford I45歲，母親Mary de Say45歲。他於1308年與Eve De Clavering結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1314年6月24日在蘇格蘭斯林史爾班諾可本享年35歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可明日香。

zh-hans.Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Scotland: 苏格兰斯林史爾班諾可本
zh-hans.Langley Abbey, Norfolk, England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可明日香
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Ufford于1279年6月11日出生在英国素福爾可斯托福时，他的父亲Robert de Ufford I45岁，母亲Mary de Say45岁。他于1308年与Eve De Clavering结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1314年6月24日在苏格兰斯林史爾班諾可本享年35岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可明日香。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ufford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ufford (Northamptonshire), Ufford (Suffolk), or Offord Cluny or Offord Darcy (Huntingdonshire). The Northamptonshire and Suffolk placenames derive from the Old English personal name Uffa + Old English worth ‘enclosure’. For the Huntingdonshire placename see Offord , with which the surname may have been confused.

variants.name: Offord
meanings: English (East Anglia and London): habitational name from Offord Cluny and Offord Darcy in Huntindgonshire. The placename derives from Old English upp ‘up, upper’ + ford ‘ford’.
English: alternatively, from a lost place called Offord near Pennyford in Wootton Wawen, Warwickshire. The placename derives from the Old English personal name Offa + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Ufford was born on 11 June 1279, in Stow, Suffolk, England, his father, Robert de Ufford I, was 45 and his mother, Mary de Say, was 45. He married Eve De Clavering in 1308. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 24 June 1314, in Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Scotland, at the age of 35, and was buried in Langley, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Ufford est né le 11 juin 1279, à Stow, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Ufford I, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Mary de Say, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Eve De Clavering en 1308. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 24 juin 1314, à Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Langley, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas de Ufford am 11. Juni 1279 in Stow, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Ufford I 45 und seine Mutter Mary de Say 45. Er hat 1308 Eve De Clavering geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 24. Juni 1314 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Scotland und wurde in Langley, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Ufford è nato il il 11 giugno 1279 nel Stow, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Robert de Ufford I, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Mary de Say, aveva 45 anni. Lui sposato Eve De Clavering nel 1308. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 24 giugno 1314, nel Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Scotland, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolto a Langley, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Langley Abbey, Norfolk, England: イギリスイギリスノーフォルクラングリー

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Uffordが1279年6月11日にイギリススフォルクストウで生まれた時，父Robert de Ufford Iは45歳，母Mary de Sayは45歳であった。1308年にEve De Claveringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1314年6月24日にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアバノクブルンで35歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクラングリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Ufford(이)가 1279년 6월 11일 영국 수폴크 스타우에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Ufford I(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary de Say(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1308년 Eve De Clavering(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1314년 6월 24일 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 반옥k번에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 랭글리에 묻혔다.

pt.11 Jun 1279–24 June 1314: 11 de junho de 1279–24 de junho de 1314
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Ufford nasceu em 11 de junho de 1279, em Stow, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Ufford I, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Say, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Eve De Clavering em 1308. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 24 de junho de 1314, em Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Scotland, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em Langley, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Ufford родился 11 июня 1279 г. в местности стоу, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Ufford I было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary de Say, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Eve De Clavering в 1308 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 24 июня 1314 г. в местности банноккбурн, стирлингшир, Шотландия в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности лангли, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.11 Jun 1279–24 June 1314: 11 de junio de 1279–24 de junio de 1314
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas de Ufford nació el 11 de junio de 1279, en Stow, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Ufford I, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Mary de Say, tenía 45 años. Se casó con Eve De Clavering en 1308. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 24 de junio de 1314, en Bannockburn, Stirlingshire, Scotland, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultado en Langley, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
